User.title: User
User.description: Represents a customer user of the delivery platform, including their profile and preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

phoneNumber.description: The user's registered phone number, used for authentication.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

loyaltyPoints.description: Current balance of loyalty points for the user.

walletId.description: Reference to the User's Wallet entity. (Relationship: User 1:1 Wallet)

lastActiveAt.description: Timestamp when the user was last active.

preferredGovernorateId.description: Reference to the User's preferred Governorate entity. (Relationship: User 1:1 Governorate)

favoritesStoreIds.description: Array of IDs of favorite stores. (Relationship: User N:N Store)

favoritesProductIds.description: Array of IDs of favorite products. (Relationship: User N:N Product)

subscriptionId.description: Reference to the User's active Subscription entity. (Relationship: User 1:1 Subscription)

Driver.title: Driver
Driver.description: Represents a delivery driver registered on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Driver entity.

phoneNumber.description: The driver's registered phone number, used for authentication.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the driver's profile picture.

vehicleType.description: Type of vehicle used by the driver (e.g., 'motorcycle', 'car').

licensePlate.description: The license plate number of the driver's vehicle.

status.description: Current availability status of the driver (e.g., 'available', 'on_delivery', 'offline').

currentLocationLatitude.description: Current latitude of the driver's location for real-time tracking.

currentLocationLongitude.description: Current longitude of the driver's location for real-time tracking.

rating.description: Average rating received by the driver from customers.

lastActiveAt.description: Timestamp when the driver was last active.

walletId.description: Reference to the Driver's Wallet entity. (Relationship: Driver 1:1 Wallet)

governorateId.description: Reference to the primary Governorate where the driver operates. (Relationship: Driver 1:1 Governorate)

Store.title: Store
Store.description: Represents a merchant store from which products can be ordered.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Store entity.

description.description: A brief description of the store.

address.description: The physical address of the store.

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for the store.

email.description: Contact email address for the store.

logoUrl.description: URL to the store's logo image.

coverImageUrl.description: URL to the store's cover image.

openingHours.description: Operating hours of the store (e.g., '9:00 AM - 10:00 PM').

status.description: Current operational status of the store (e.g., 'open', 'closed').

averageRating.description: Average rating given to the store by customers.

governorateId.description: Reference to the Governorate entity where the store is located. (Relationship: Store 1:1 Governorate)

categoryIds.description: Array of IDs of categories this store belongs to. (Relationship: Store N:N Category)

locationLatitude.description: Latitude of the store's physical location.

locationLongitude.description: Longitude of the store's physical location.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product offered by a store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

storeId.description: Reference to the Store entity that offers this product. (Relationship: Store 1:N Product)

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category entity this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The base price of the product.

discountPrice.description: The discounted price of the product, if applicable.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

options.description: List of customizable options for the product, like sizes or add-ons.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's delivery order placed on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed the order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

storeId.description: Reference to the Store from which the order was placed. (Relationship: Store 1:N Order)

driverId.description: Reference to the Driver assigned to this order. (Relationship: Driver 1:N Order)

orderItems.description: List of products included in the order with their quantities and selected options.

deliveryAddress.description: The full address for the order delivery.

totalAmount.description: The total final amount paid for the order, including all fees and discounts.

subtotal.description: The sum of prices of all order items before fees and discounts.

tipAmount.description: Optional tip amount given to the driver.

couponId.description: Reference to the Coupon applied to this order. (Relationship: Order 1:1 Coupon)

discountAmount.description: The total discount applied to the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

acceptedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was accepted by the store/driver.

preparedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was marked as preparing.

onTheWayAt.description: Timestamp when the order was marked as on the way.

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the order was marked as delivered.

cancelledAt.description: Timestamp when the order was cancelled.

ratingId.description: Reference to the Rating entity associated with this order. (Relationship: Order 1:1 Rating)

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category for organizing stores or products.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the category.

displayOrder.description: A numerical value to determine the display order of the category in the UI.

parentCategoryId.description: Reference to a parent Category, if this is a sub-category. (Relationship: Category 1:N Category - self-referencing)

Offer.title: Offer
Offer.description: Represents a promotional offer or discount available on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Offer entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the offer.

type.description: The type of discount or benefit (e.g., 'percentage_discount', 'fixed_amount_discount', 'free_delivery').

value.description: The value of the offer (e.g., 10 for 10% or $10).

minOrderAmount.description: Minimum order amount required to apply this offer.

startDate.description: The date and time when the offer becomes active.

endDate.description: The date and time when the offer expires.

isActive.description: Indicates if the offer is currently active.

storeIds.description: Array of IDs of stores to which this offer applies. (Relationship: Offer N:N Store)

productIds.description: Array of IDs of products to which this offer applies. (Relationship: Offer N:N Product)

appliesToAllStores.description: If true, this offer applies to all stores, ignoring 'storeIds'.

appliesToAllProducts.description: If true, this offer applies to all products, ignoring 'productIds'.

Coupon.title: Coupon
Coupon.description: Represents a redeemable coupon code providing discounts or benefits.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Coupon entity.

code.description: The actual coupon code that users enter (e.g., 'SAVE10').

description.description: A description of the coupon and its benefits.

type.description: The type of discount or benefit (e.g., 'percentage_discount', 'fixed_amount_discount').

value.description: The value of the coupon (e.g., 10 for 10% or $10).

minOrderAmount.description: Minimum order amount required to apply this coupon.

usageLimit.description: The total number of times this coupon can be used across all users.

perUserLimit.description: The maximum number of times a single user can apply this coupon.

usedCount.description: The current count of how many times this coupon has been used.

startDate.description: The date and time when the coupon becomes active.

endDate.description: The date and time when the coupon expires.

isActive.description: Indicates if the coupon is currently active.

storeIds.description: Array of IDs of stores to which this coupon applies. (Relationship: Coupon N:N Store)

productIds.description: Array of IDs of products to which this coupon applies. (Relationship: Coupon N:N Product)

Wallet.title: Wallet
Wallet.description: Represents a digital wallet for users or drivers to manage their balance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Wallet entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User or Driver who owns this wallet. (Polymorphic: User/Driver 1:1 Wallet)

ownerType.description: The type of owner for this wallet ('user' or 'driver').

balance.description: The current monetary balance in the wallet.

currency.description: The currency of the wallet balance (e.g., 'EGP', 'USD').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the wallet was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the wallet was last updated.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a financial transaction associated with a wallet.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

walletId.description: Reference to the Wallet involved in this transaction. (Relationship: Wallet 1:N Transaction)

amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction.

currency.description: The currency of the transaction amount.

description.description: A brief description or purpose of the transaction.

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., 'completed', 'pending', 'failed').

referenceId.description: Optional reference ID to link to the source entity (e.g., Order ID, Donation ID).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created.

Rating.title: Rating
Rating.description: Represents a rating provided by a user for an order, store, product, or driver.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Rating entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who provided the rating. (Relationship: User 1:N Rating)

orderId.description: Reference to the Order associated with this rating. (Relationship: Order 1:1 Rating)

storeId.description: Reference to the Store that received the rating. (Relationship: Store 1:N Rating)

productId.description: Reference to the Product that received the rating. (Relationship: Product 1:N Rating)

driverId.description: Reference to the Driver who received the rating. (Relationship: Driver 1:N Rating)

ratingValue.description: The numerical rating value (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

comment.description: Optional text comment accompanying the rating.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the rating was created.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification sent to a specific user or driver.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

recipientId.description: Reference to the User or Driver who is the recipient of the notification. (Polymorphic: User/Driver 1:N Notification)

recipientType.description: The type of recipient for this notification ('user' or 'driver').

body.description: The main content or message of the notification.

type.description: The category or purpose of the notification (e.g., 'order_status_update', 'promo').

isRead.description: Indicates if the recipient has read the notification.

targetUrl.description: Optional URL or deep link associated with the notification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created.

Governorate.title: Governorate
Governorate.description: Represents a geographical governorate or region where the service is available.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Governorate entity.

name.description: The name of the governorate in primary language (e.g., 'Cairo').

nameAr.description: The Arabic name of the governorate.

isActive.description: Indicates if the service is currently active in this governorate.

deliveryZones.description: List of defined delivery zones within the governorate with their associated fees.

Ad.title: Ad
Ad.description: Represents an advertisement to be displayed within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ad entity.

title.description: The title or headline of the advertisement.

description.description: A brief description of the ad's content or offer.

imageUrl.description: URL to the image creative for the advertisement.

targetUrl.description: The URL or deep link where the ad directs users.

displayLocation.description: The intended location within the app where the ad should be displayed (e.g., 'homepage_banner').

startDate.description: The date and time when the ad campaign starts.

endDate.description: The date and time when the ad campaign ends.

isActive.description: Indicates if the advertisement is currently active.

priority.description: A numerical value to prioritize display among multiple active ads.

storeId.description: Reference to the Store entity if the ad is store-specific. (Relationship: Ad 1:1 Store)

Donation.title: Donation
Donation.description: Represents a donation made by a user to a charitable cause.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Donation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who made the donation. (Relationship: User 1:N Donation)

amount.description: The monetary amount of the donation.

currency.description: The currency of the donation amount.

charityName.description: The name of the charity receiving the donation.

transactionId.description: Reference to the Transaction entity for the donation payment. (Relationship: Donation 1:1 Transaction)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the donation was made.

status.description: The processing status of the donation (e.g., 'completed', 'pending').

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: Represents a user's subscription to a premium service plan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Subscription entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who holds this subscription. (Relationship: User 1:1 Subscription)

planName.description: The name of the subscription plan (e.g., 'VIP Monthly').

price.description: The price of the subscription plan.

currency.description: The currency of the subscription price.

startDate.description: The date and time when the subscription became active.

endDate.description: The date and time when the subscription is set to expire.

status.description: The current status of the subscription (e.g., 'active', 'cancelled', 'expired').

paymentTransactionId.description: Reference to the Transaction entity for the subscription payment. (Relationship: Subscription 1:1 Transaction)

benefits.description: List of benefits included with this subscription plan (e.g., 'free_delivery').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription record was last updated.

LoyaltyPointTransaction.title: LoyaltyPointTransaction
LoyaltyPointTransaction.description: Represents a historical record of loyalty points being earned, redeemed, or adjusted for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LoyaltyPointTransaction entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this loyalty points transaction. (Relationship: User 1:N LoyaltyPointTransaction)

type.description: The type of loyalty points transaction (e.g., 'earned', 'redeemed', 'expired').

pointsAmount.description: The number of loyalty points involved in this transaction (positive for earned, negative for redeemed/expired).

description.description: A brief description of why the points were added or deducted.

referenceId.description: Optional reference ID to link to the source (e.g., Order ID, Coupon ID).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the loyalty points transaction occurred.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. The document ID {userId} matches the Firebase Authentication UID. Owner can read/write their own profile. Includes denormalized favorite store and product IDs.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores delivery driver profiles. The document ID {driverId} matches the Firebase Authentication UID. Driver can read/write their own profile. Admins can manage all driver profiles.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the driver.

definition.description: Contains merchant store details. Publicly readable. Includes 'adminUserId' for authorization, which grants write access to the specific store owner/manager. QAPs supported by 'governorateId' and 'categoryIds'.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the store.

definition.description: Lists products offered by a specific store. Publicly readable. Includes denormalized 'storeAdminUserId' from the parent store for authorization independence, allowing write access by the store's admin without a 'get()' call. QAPs supported by 'categoryId' and 'isAvailable'.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent store.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Stores customer-specific order details. The document ID {orderId} is unique to the order. Authorized by 'userId' (from path and document) for customers and 'driverId' (from document) for assigned drivers. Includes 'storeId' for context. Supports QAPs for users (their orders) and drivers (their assigned orders).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who placed the order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

definition.description: Defines global product and store categories. Publicly readable. Admin-only write access. Supports QAPs for listing categories.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the category.

definition.description: Manages platform-wide promotional offers. Publicly readable. Admin-only write access. Supports QAPs for listing active offers and filtering by 'storeIds'/'productIds'.

params.name: offerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the offer.

definition.description: Manages redeemable coupon codes. Publicly readable (for active coupons). Admin-only write access. Supports QAPs for listing active coupons.

params.name: couponId
params.description: The unique identifier for the coupon.

definition.description: The digital wallet for a specific user. The document ID 'wallet' is a fixed name. 'ownerId' field in the document must match the {userId} from the path for authorization independence. Only the owning user can read/write.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who owns the wallet.

definition.description: The digital wallet for a specific driver. The document ID 'wallet' is a fixed name. 'ownerId' field in the document must match the {driverId} from the path for authorization independence. Only the owning driver can read/write.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the driver who owns the wallet.

definition.description: Records financial transactions related to a user's wallet. Includes 'ownerId' (matching {userId} from path) for authorization independence. Only the owning user can read their transactions. QAPs supported for user's transaction history.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who owns the transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

definition.description: Records financial transactions related to a driver's wallet. Includes 'ownerId' (matching {driverId} from path) for authorization independence. Only the owning driver can read their transactions. QAPs supported for driver's transaction history.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the driver who owns the transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

definition.description: Stores ratings provided by a user for a specific order. 'userId' from path and document matches for authorization independence. The creating user can read/write their own rating. Publicly readable for aggregation, but private at creation for the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who provided the rating.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order being rated.

params.name: ratingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the rating.

definition.description: Stores notifications specific to a user. 'recipientId' field in the document must match {userId} from the path for authorization independence. Only the recipient user can read/mark as read.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the notification recipient.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

definition.description: Stores notifications specific to a driver. 'recipientId' field in the document must match {driverId} from the path for authorization independence. Only the recipient driver can read/mark as read.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the notification recipient.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

definition.description: Lists available geographical governorates. Publicly readable. Admin-only write access. Supports QAPs for listing active governorates.

params.name: governorateId
params.description: The unique identifier for the governorate.

definition.description: Manages advertisements displayed in the app. Publicly readable. Admin-only write access. Supports QAPs for filtering by 'isActive' and 'displayLocation'.

params.name: adId
params.description: The unique identifier for the advertisement.

definition.description: Records donations made by a specific user. 'userId' from path and document matches for authorization independence. Only the donating user can read/write their own donations. Supports QAPs for a user's donation history.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who made the donation.

params.name: donationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the donation.

definition.description: Manages subscriptions for a specific user. 'userId' from path and document matches for authorization independence. Only the owning user can read/write their subscriptions. Supports QAPs for a user's subscription details.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who owns the subscription.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subscription.

definition.description: Records loyalty point transactions for a specific user. 'userId' from path and document matches for authorization independence. Only the user can read their loyalty point history. Supports QAPs for a user's loyalty activity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user associated with the transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the loyalty point transaction.

definition.description: A metadata collection for Database Access Control (DBAC). The existence of a document at this path signifies that the user with {adminUid} has administrative privileges. Used for Authorization Independence for admin actions.

params.name: adminUid
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of a user granted administrative privileges.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for the "أبشر" delivery platform is designed to prioritize security, scalability, and debuggability, adhering to the core design principles outlined. It extensively leverages path-based authorization and strategic denormalization to achieve Authorization Independence and support Queryable Access Patterns (QAPs).

**Authorization Independence:**
1.  **User and Driver Owned Data:** Entities like `User`, `Driver`, `Donation`, `Subscription`, `LoyaltyPointTransaction`, `Notification`, `Wallet`, and `Transaction` are primarily nested under `/users/{userId}/...` or `/drivers/{driverId}/...`. In these cases, the `userId` or `driverId` from the path wildcard *must* match a corresponding `id`, `ownerId`, or `recipientId` field within the document itself. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls to parent documents for authorization, making rules atomic and easy to debug. For instance, a user's order at `/users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}` explicitly contains `userId` matching the path, allowing `allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;`.
2.  **Store and Product Management:** For entities like `Store` which have specific management rights, a `adminUserId` field will be added to the `Store` document, identifying the user responsible for managing it. For `Product` documents, which are nested under `/stores/{storeId}/products/{productId}`, the `storeAdminUserId` will be denormalized directly from the parent `Store` document into each `Product` document. This allows product write rules to directly check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.storeAdminUserId` without performing a `get()` on the parent store, ensuring atomic product updates and creations.
3.  **Transactions:** To maintain authorization independence, `Transaction` documents (nested under `/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactionId}` or `/drivers/{driverId}/transactions/{transactionId}`) will include an `ownerId` field. This `ownerId` will match the `userId` or `driverId` from the path, enabling direct authorization checks on the transaction document without fetching the associated wallet.

**QAPs (Queryable Access Patterns):**
1.  **Structural Segregation:** Publicly accessible, global data such as `Categories`, `Offers`, `Coupons`, `Governorates`, and `Ads` are placed in top-level collections (e.g., `/categories`). This design allows for simple `allow read: true;` rules, enabling efficient and secure `list` queries for all users without complex filtering logic in security rules.
2.  **Path-Based Filtering:** For user-specific data, collections like `/users/{userId}/orders` naturally filter `list` queries by the `userId` present in the path. This means a user can only query and retrieve their own orders, inherently supporting secure `list` operations.
3.  **Denormalized Query Fields:** Key query fields (e.g., `storeId`, `categoryId`, `isAvailable` for Products; `isActive`, `storeIds` for Offers/Coupons) are directly present in the documents. This allows for efficient querying and indexing, supporting various `list` operations (e.g., 'all active offers', 'products from a specific store in a category') while maintaining clear security boundaries.

**DBAC (Database-Based Access Control):** Global admin roles are managed via a dedicated collection, `/roles_admin/{adminUid}`. The mere existence of a document at this path for `request.auth.uid` grants administrative privileges, simplifying rule logic for admin operations without relying on custom claims.

This architecture ensures that security rules are straightforward, explicit, and don't rely on expensive or insecure `get()` operations, making the system robust, scalable, and easy to maintain and debug.
